title: Amtech B3750 3-in-1 Staple Gun
features: VERSATILE: This 3-in-1 staple gun uses crown staples for fixing cables, flat staples for upholstery and brad nails for joinery
EASY TO USE: Provided with a handy storage case, it has an impact pressure adjustment for ease of use
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Staple gun See more
